M0320_SAF_FIRE_SAF (M0320) Lack of Fire Safety Devices Safety hazards: lack of fire safety devices. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0320_SAF_PAINT (M0320) Lead-Based Paint Safety hazards: lead-based paint. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0320_SAF_NONE (M0320) No Safety Hazards Safety hazards: none. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x

M0320_SAF_FLOORCOV (M0320) Unsafe Floor Coverings Safety
